interactive.rationale: Each preset input now updates a live computed readout showing caret-animation, animation-name, and invalid keyword rejection.

references.rationale: The 'see also' section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544 — matches the feature.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: The preset readout explicitly shows CSS.supports('caret-animation: blink') is false while every preset uses manual.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: focused typewriter, pulse, matrix, pride, heartbeat, and terminal inputs. Every preset computed to caret-animation manual with the expected keyframe name, CSS.supports('caret-animation: blink') was false, and console/network were clean.
